holdings.infoBox: PHEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 187 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.99%, Apple at 7.26%, Microsoft at 4.56%, Amazon.com at 3.88%, and Alphabet at 3.63%.

overview.description: The Parametric Hedged Equity ETF (PHEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund invests in individual US large-cap stocks while utilizing a laddered options strategy to mitigate losses. The option strategy caps the potential upside participation. PHEQ was launched on Oct 16, 2023 and is issued by Parametric.
